title: Beverage dispensing system including point of sales data acquisition
abstract: A beverage dispensing system (10) comprising a beverage dispensing region for a drinking establishment, said beverage dispensing region comprising a non-contact measuring device (30) adapted for capturing one or more images of: the stream of beverage (26) being dispensed from the spout (24) of a tapping head (20) and the beverage recipient (28), and/or the beverage dispensing control means (22).
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A beverage dispensing system comprising a beverage dispensing region for a drinking establishment, said beverage dispensing region including: a point of sales (POS) region defined by the interface between an operator and a customer, a tapping head for dispensing beverage, the tapping head having a beverage dispensing control means which is activated manually by said operator and a spout for dispensing beverage into a beverage recipient, and a non-contact measuring device adjacent said beverage dispensing control means and adapted for capturing one or more images of: a stream of beverage being dispensed from the spout of said tapping head and the beverage recipient, and/or said beverage dispensing control means. 2. A beverage dispensing system according to claim 1 , wherein said tapping head is mounted on a beverage counter, said beverage counter defining at least an operator side and a beverage side, said beverage side comprising at least one face, said tapping head protruding from the at least one face of said beverage side of said beverage counter, said tapping head being connectable to a tapping line extending through said beverage side to a beverage container which includes a beverage, in which said beverage may flow from said beverage container via said tapping line and said tapping head to said spout and from said spout to the beverage recipient. 3. A beverage dispensing system according to claim 1 , wherein the at least one face is a vertical face and said tapping head is part of an assembly of tapping heads arranged along the horizontal direction of said vertical face. 4. A beverage dispensing system according to claim 1 , wherein said tapping head is part of a beverage font in a beverage font assembly, said beverage font assembly comprising a bar counter, said beverage font being mounted in said bar counter, said bar counter defining an operator side and a customer side opposite said operator side, said tapping head having a spout and a beverage dispensing control means and being connectable to a tapping line extending through said beverage font to a beverage container which includes a beverage, 

 in which said beverage may flow from said beverage container via said tapping line and said tapping head to said spout and from said spout to the beverage recipient. 5. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claims, wherein said non-contact measuring device is in the form of a camera. 6. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claims, wherein said beverage dispensing control means is in the form of a tap handle, a pushing button, or combination of both. 7. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claims, wherein said non-contact measuring device is integrated in: said beverage side of said beverage counter, said bar counter of said beverage font assembly, or both. 8. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claims, wherein said non-contact measuring device is integrated in said beverage font of said beverage font assembly. 9. A beverage dispensing system according to claim 8, wherein said non-contact device is integrated in the conduit of the font connecting the vertical portion of the font with the tap handle and spout. 10. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claim, wherein said beverage dispensing control means is in the form of a tap handle and wherein said non-contact measuring device is integrated in the tap handle and adapted to capturing said image when the tap handle is moved into a beverage dispensing position. 1 1. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claim, wherein said non-contact measuring device is mounted adjacent said beverage counter or adjacent said bar counter. 12. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claim, wherein a single non-contact measuring device is used. 13. A beverage dispensing system according to any of claims 1-1 1 , wherein a plurality of non-contact measuring devices is used. 14. A beverage dispensing system according to any preceding claim, wherein a computer system or artificial intelligence system is adapted to receive said one or more images of the stream of beverage being dispensed from said spout and the beverage recipient, and/or said beverage dispensing control means, and to convert the information of such images into useful information in the form of servings per tap, glass size, volume of beverage in the glasses including foam level, temperature of glass, temperature of liquid coming out of the faucet, color of beverage, beverage bubble structure within the beverage recipient, and combinations thereof. 15. A method of assembling a beverage dispensing system comprising a beverage dispensing region for a drinking establishment, the method including installing in said beverage dispensing region a tapping head for dispensing beverage, the tapping head having a spout and a beverage dispensing control means such as a tap handle, and installing a non-contact measuring device adapted for capturing one or more images of: - the stream of beverage being dispensed from the spout of said tapping head and the beverage recipient, and/or the beverage dispensing control means.
